# QoF v1.2.2's Changelog

> [!NOTE]
> A Minecraft Bedrock addon that adds small vanilla-friendly features. Each module is configurable through the in-game pack settings panel. Requires **BetaAPIs** enabled under Experiments.

## Pack Info

Full changelog: [v1.2.2](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/commits/v1.2.2) or [compare](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2) Releases: [v1.2.2](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.2.2) LICENSE: [MIT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/main/LICENSE)\
Release Date: [Mar/21/2026 (14:56:41)](https://time.is/Unix_time_converter/1774105001)

Base Game Version: [26.3](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/articles/43861703542925-Minecraft-Bedrock-Edition-26-3-Changelog)\
Dependency: [2.6.0@beta](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@minecraft/server/v/2.6.0-beta.1.26.3-stable)

## Changelogs

## Mob Loot+

Add mob loot to previously unlootable mobs

1. Sniffer Drop `Moss Block`

$$ P(Drop) = 1 $$
> Looting won't affect the drop range

1. Piglin Brute Drop `Gilded BlackStone`

$$ P(Drop) \in \langle 0, 1 \rangle $$
> Looting won't affect the drop range

### Recipe+

A more accessible way to obtain items

#### 1. Stripped Block of Bamboo to Charcoal (`Furnace`)

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/main/.github/img/v1.2.2/charcoal-bamboo2.png" alt="Smelting stripped bamboo block to charcoal in furnace">
</div>

**alt-text**: Smelting stripped bamboo block to charcoal in *furnace*

  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/main/.github/img/v1.2.2/rooted_dirt.png" alt="Dirt & Root craft to Rooted Dirt in crafting table">

#### 3. Skull with Paper to Banner Pattern (`Crafting Table`)

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/main/.github/img/v1.2.2/skull.png" alt="Skull & Paper craft to Banner Pattern in crafting table">

**alt-text**: `Skull & Paper` craft to `Banner Pattern` in *crafting table*

Fix
- `stone_slab` to `normal_stone_slab`

Removed
- Rotten Fresh Hide (`Furnace, Smoker, Campfire, Soul Campfire`)
- Charcoal to Block of Coal (`Crafting Table`)

## Configs

- Offhand is now configurable through in-game world settings

## (New) Offhand

- Allow players to double sneak to swap the main hand and offhand
- `work as intend` Enchantments and item color still cannot be transferred due to `API limitations` that do not allow editing the offhand cleanly

## (New) Harvest

- Allow players to hold a hoe and harvest crops with automatic seed replanting
- Hoe will lose durability\* when destroying the crop in order to balance auto replanting\
  \* Durability is calculated based on the real Minecraft formula $\mathrm{Loss} = \mathrm{random} < \frac{1}{\mathrm{level} + 1}$

## Composter+

- Composter no longer uses a hard-coded vanilla list to check if an item is compostable, and now uses the official compostable item component
- Added bowl return logic inside hopper logic

## Dev Side & Bug Fixes

- Fixed grammar in `manifest.json`
- Fixed concrete powder trying to spawn items in an unloaded chunk
- Fixed light blocks trying to place in an unloaded chunk
- Fixed shovel and hoe not working when a light block is above dirt-type blocks
- Bumped `@minecraft` in `package.json` from `^2.5.0` to `^2.6.0-beta.1.26.3-stable`, giving developers more tools to work with
